name: CodeMirror Editor
description: A multi-tab code editor with collaborative editing, OT content sync, and configurable language modes

charmiq.command.name: getText
charmiq.command.description: Return the text content of the specified tab or the active tab

tabId.description: ID of the tab to read (defaults to active tab)

outputSchema.description: The tab content, or null if the tab was not found

charmiq.command.name: setText
charmiq.command.description: Replace the text content of the specified tab or the active tab

tabId.description: ID of the tab to write (defaults to active tab)

charmiq.command.name: listTabs
charmiq.command.description: Return metadata for every open tab

charmiq.command.name: switchTab
charmiq.command.description: Activate an existing tab by ID

tabId.description: ID of the tab to activate

outputSchema.description: True if the tab was found and activated, false otherwise

charmiq.command.name: createTab
charmiq.command.description: Create a new editor tab with optional name, content, and language mode

outputSchema.description: True if the tab was created, false if at the maximum tab limit

charmiq.command.name: removeTab
charmiq.command.description: Close and remove a tab by ID (cannot remove the last remaining tab)

tabId.description: ID of the tab to remove

outputSchema.description: True if the tab was removed, false if not found or is the sole tab
